ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Name of the exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "last_split_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock split */,
  "last_split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the last stock split */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "dividend_per_share" REAL /* Dividend per share */,
  "next_earnings_date" TEXT /* Date of the next earnings report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades on the given date */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time price record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument at the given timestamp */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades at the given timestamp */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount at the given timestamp */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio at the given timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_prices_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last time the user changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "last_rebalance_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last rebalanced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio instrument record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the instrument was purchased */,
  "last_valuation" REAL /* Last valuation of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last valuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was executed */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "return_percentage" REAL /* Return percentage of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value of the portfolio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI, MACD) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the technical indicator is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news article to the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, technical indicator) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert should be triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the watchlist (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_instruments" (
  "watchlist_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist instrument record */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was added to the watchlist */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the instrument was checked in the watchlist */,
  "alert_triggered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an alert has been triggered for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_instruments_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
